steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, area equals length times width. Here, the area is $630$ square inches and the length is $70$ inches, so set up $630=70w$.

steps.title: Use the area formula to find width
steps.content:
For a rectangle, area equals length times width. We have area = 630 and length = 70, so:
$$630 = 70 \times w$$
Divide both sides by 70:
$$w = \frac{630}{70} = 9$$
The width is 9 inches. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
